accessTokenHint: The token the device presents. Generate one or paste your own.
certificateIdHint: The certificate subject or fingerprint the device presents.
commandHint: The commands this device's published profile declares.
commandNameHint: The command the device knows how to handle.
countExceedsMax: Count cannot exceed {{max}} per bulk create.
credentialTypeHint: How the device proves its identity.
deleteCredentialConfirm: Delete this {{credentialType}} credential? The device can no longer authenticate with it.
deviceTypeBatchHint: Every device in the batch gets this type.
externalIdTemplateHint: Optional business id. Supports {n}, {n:0Wd}, and {random} for a random id per device.
externalIdTemplateNeedsVariation: External ID template must include {n}, {n:0Wd} or {random} when creating more than one device.
nameTemplateNoRandom: Name template must not use {random}; it is only meaningful for external IDs.
noAssignments: This device is not assigned. Its telemetry still flows — assign it to give its events a customer/area/asset anchor.
noCommandsDeclaredHint: This device's profile declares no commands, so any command name is accepted. Declare commands on its device profile — and publish it — to get a typed form here.
noCommandsIssued: No commands have been issued to this device yet.
noCredentials: No credentials registered for this device yet.
noEvents: No events received from this device yet.
noMeasurements: No measurements received from this device yet.
noStateRecorded: No state recorded for this device yet.
passwordHint: Stored write-only; never shown again after this.
payloadFreeformHint: Optional. Sent to the device verbatim (e.g. JSON).
payloadStructuredHint: This command declares a structured parameter, so its payload is entered as JSON.
renderedTokenInvalid: Rendered token “{{token}}” is not valid: use letters, digits, hyphens and underscores.
startIndexMustBePositive: Start index must be a whole number ≥ 1.
structuredParameterHint: Structured parameter — send this command with a raw payload instead.
title: Devices
tokenTemplateHint: Must include {n} or {n:0Wd} (zero-padded to width W).
tokenTemplateNeedsIndex: Token template must contain an {n} placeholder so every device gets a distinct token.
tokenTemplateNoRandom: Token template must not use {random}; use {n} or {n:0Wd} so tokens are reproducible.
typeIdentityIntro: Manufacturer and model identify the physical device. They are discovery facets — used to filter and group — so the fields suggest values already in use to keep them consistent, while still letting you type a new one.
typeProfileCapabilityLimitedBody: Devices of this type are still classified and displayed, but report no typed metrics, accept no commands, and raise no alarms until a profile is attached.
typeProfileCreate: Create a profile for this type
typeProfileDetachConfirm: Detach “{{token}}” from this device type? Its devices keep working but lose their typed capabilities — no metric typing, commands, or alarms — until a profile is re-attached. The profile itself is not deleted.
typeProfileIntro: A profile is the reusable capability contract — metrics, commands, and alarm rules — that this device type adopts. Authoring lives on the profile; here you choose which one this type uses.
typeProfileLoadError: Couldn’t load the profiles to choose from. You can still create one below.
typeProfileNoPermission: You don’t have permission to change this type’s profile.
typeProfileShared: Shared by {{count}} device types — changes to its definitions affect all of them.
vocabularyUnavailableHint: Couldn't read this device's commands, so its declared vocabulary isn't shown. Anything you send is still checked by the server.
